familyLawReview.description: Simon Bacon served as Child Support Editor for the Family Law Review, published by Thomson Reuters, contributing peer-reviewed articles on the complexities of the child support system.

articles.title: The Substitution Order in Child Support Litigation
articles.journal: Family Law Review, Vol 8, No 1 — Analysis of Godwin v Glass [2017] FCCA 1695

articles.title: The Child Support Registrar Appearing Amicus Curiae
Pre-emptive declaratory orders and the enforcement of child support
articles.journal: Family Law Review, Vol 7, No 2 — Discussing CGU Insurance Ltd v Blakeley and child support enforcement

articles.title: Child support and the autochthonous expedient
The fog of overseas child support
articles.journal: Family Law Review, Vol 6, No 1 — Examining Child Support Registrar v Higgins [2016] FamCAFC 2 regarding altering overseas liabilities

articles.title: Depreciation and child support
articles.description: Examines how business depreciation expenses are regularly challenged under section 117(2)(c)(i) of the Child Support (Assessment) Act 1989, discussing the diversity of opinion in the then-Federal Magistrates Court regarding how to handle depreciation expenses when determining child support.

podcasts.description: Featured guest on Tax Talks — Australia's leading tax education podcast.

episodes.title: Child Support Payments
episodes.description: An overview of how child support payments work in Australia, the assessment formula, and common issues parents face.

episodes.title: PSI in Child Support Assessments
episodes.description: How Personal Services Income rules affect child support assessments for contractors and professionals operating through entities.

episodes.title: Child Maintenance Trust
episodes.description: The role of trusts in child support arrangements and how they interact with assessment rules and tax obligations.

episodes.title: Non-Agency Payments
episodes.description: Understanding when direct payments to the other parent or third parties can be credited against a child support liability.

episodes.title: Child Support Lump Sum Payments
episodes.description: How lump-sum payments — including property transfers — can be structured within binding child support agreements.

episodes.title: Child Support Subpoena
episodes.description: The use of subpoenas in child support proceedings and what information can be compelled from third parties.

news.title: Leaders in Family and Child Support Law in Melbourne
news.description: Feature article recognising Simon Bacon as one of Australia's eminent practitioners in child support, covering his career, expertise, and contributions to the field.

news.title: Men seek proof of paternity before paying up
news.description: Simon Bacon featured as an expert in this Herald Sun article on paternity testing and child support obligations in Australia.
